Private Therapy Practice

You don't have to navigate life alone.

Compassionate, evidence-based therapy designed to help you navigate anxiety, burnout, relationships, and life's transitions with clarity, warmth, and resilience.

Book a Consultation Learn More
How we work

We keep details strong and simple

1

Connect

Start with a quiet, no-obligation conversation. We align on your goals, concerns, and confirm our mutual therapeutic fit.

2

Reflect

Unpack patterns and emotional blocks. We use somatic insights and modern clinical models to build self-awareness and core safety.

3

Grow

Integrate healthy boundaries and sustainable emotional habits to step confidently into the next chapter of your life.

Why therapy

A thoughtful path to lasting clarity

A

Emotional Clarity

Develop nuanced self-awareness of recurring emotional patterns, empowering you to make conscious choices aligned with your deepest values.

B

Stronger Boundaries

Cultivate enduring relational frameworks that safeguard your time, emotional energy, and well-being — without guilt or depletion.

C

Greater Calm

Master evidence-based somatic regulation techniques to restore nervous-system equilibrium and sustainably reduce stress and anxiety.

Philosophy & Approach

"Therapy is not about fixing what is broken. It is a collaborative space to rediscover your safety, remember your boundaries, and live aligned with your truth."

I believe emotional healing happens when mind and body work in harmony. My private practice integrates clinical psychodynamic therapy, nervous-system regulation, and evidence-based stress strategies to support you through burnout, anxiety, and relationship changes.

Credentials & Education

Ph.D. Clinical Psychology Licensed Psychotherapist Burnout & Anxiety Specialist
Mr. Challa Founder · Lead Counselor
Accepting New Clients
Services

Plan built for serious personal growth

Practice Packages
Individual Counselling

One-on-One Sessions

$180 / session
  • Session length: 50 minutes
  • Availability: In-Person or Secure Video
  • Focus: Anxiety, depression, and career counselling
Couples Therapy

Joint Partner Sessions

$220 / session
  • Session length: 75 minutes
  • Availability: In-Person sessions preferred
  • Focus: Intimacy, communication, and family counselling
Premarital Counselling

Pre-marriage Alignment

$180 / session
  • Session length: 50 minutes
  • Availability: HIPAA-secure telehealth or office
  • Focus: Future planning, goals, and values alignment
Start Your Service
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Email hello@challascounsel.com
Get in touch
What is included in the initial session? +
The initial consultation lasts 50 minutes and involves a complete assessment of your historical background, primary struggles, and setting immediate therapeutic goals.
How much does therapy cost? +
Sessions are $180 for individuals (50 minutes) and $220 for couples (75 minutes). Sliding scale fees are available on a limited case-by-case basis.
How long does the therapy relationship last? +
Clinical needs vary. Many clients complete short-term therapy goals within 12 to 16 sessions, while others prefer ongoing, deeper check-ins over a longer period.
Do you work with out-of-network insurance? +
Yes. While we do not process insurance directly, we provide a structured monthly Superbill containing all required codes for out-of-network reimbursement.
crafted signature For Private Practice

Support begins with a simple conversation.

Schedule a free 15-minute consultation to talk through your needs and explore how we can support you.
